mentions.note: Largest IPO 2026; shrewd roll-up in attractive end markets (data centers, semiconductor fab, HVAC); enterprise multiple ~20x reasonable vs. peers; revenue accelerating, margins solid; strong backlog.

Airflow and cooling equipment for data centers and semiconductor manufacturing; IPO'd at $31.75, now ~$40; delivered much stronger than expected numbers with excellent full-year forecast; pulled back ~10% from highs—buy right here.
